name: @smithy-hono/adapter-node
description: Node/Redis runtime adapter for @smithy-hono/security-core. Implements the four storage interfaces (Session, RateLimit, Nonce, SecretProvider) over a narrow structural Redis port plus platform glue (forwarded-proto / client-IP resolvers, stdout JSON logger) — no Redis SDK at runtime (ARCH-01). Rate-limit and nonce are strongly consistent via Redis atomic ops (Lua EVAL / SET NX).

//optionalPeer.ioredis: Optional. The real Redis port (createRedisPort) takes a structural RedisClientLike satisfied by an ioredis (or node-redis with a thin shim) client; the consumer installs the client. This package defines its own minimal structural interface and intentionally does NOT depend on the SDK so it typechecks and tests with root-hoisted tooling only (the in-process fake port validates all adapter logic).
